title: Group Anagrams
description:
Given an array of strings `strs`, group the anagrams together. Return the
groups with each group sorted alphabetically and the list of groups sorted as
well (so the output is deterministic).

solutions.summary: Anagrams share the same sorted letters; use that as a map key.

steps.title: Bucket by sorted letters
steps.explanation: Two words are anagrams exactly when their sorted characters match, so use that string as the key.

steps.title: Sort for a stable output
steps.explanation: Sort within each group and then sort the groups so the result is deterministic.
